/Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Toolchains/XcodeDefault.xctoolchain/usr/bin/clang++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX26.4.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/MacNARS_HyperCausal.dir/src/HyperCausalMain.mm.o -o MacNARS_HyperCausal  -framework Metal -framework Foundation
